name: survey-target-descriptor
title: Survey Target Descriptor
description: A combination of a survey target value and a survey target type for given eco:SurveyTarget.
rdfs:comment: A combination of a survey target value and a survey target type for given eco:SurveyTarget.

fields.name: surveyTarget_fk
fields.title: Survey Target (Foreign Key)
fields.comments: The value in this field MAY be changed in aggregation to preserve the relationship to the (Primary Key).

fields.name: surveyTargetType
fields.title: Survey Target Type
fields.description: A category that best matches the nature of a scope in an eco:SurveyTarget.
fields.comments: Recommended best practice is to use a controlled vocabulary.
fields.rdfs:comment: A category that best matches the nature of a scope in an eco:SurveyTarget.

fields.name: surveyTargetTypeIRI
fields.title: Survey Target Type IRI
fields.description: An IRI of a controlled vocabulary value for a type of target.
fields.comments: Recommended best practice is to use an IRI for a term in a controlled vocabulary.
fields.rdfs:comment: The nature or genre of the resource.

fields.name: surveyTargetTypeSource
fields.title: Survey Target Type Source
fields.description: A reference to a controlled vocabulary in which the definition of a value in eco:SurveyTargetType is given.
fields.rdfs:comment: A related resource from which the described resource is derived.

fields.name: surveyTargetValue
fields.title: Survey Target Value
fields.description: A value to include or exclude in a scope categorized by eco:surveyTargetType.
fields.comments: Recommended best practice is to use a controlled vocabulary.
fields.rdfs:comment: A value to include or exclude in a scope categorized by eco:surveyTargetType.

fields.name: surveyTargetValueIRI
fields.title: Survey Target Value IRI
fields.description: A value to include or exclude in a scope categorized by eco:surveyTargetType.
fields.comments: Recommended best practice is to use an IRI for a term in a controlled vocabulary.
fields.rdfs:comment: A value to include or exclude in a scope categorized by eco:surveyTargetType.

fields.name: surveyTargetValueSource
fields.title: Survey Target Value Source
fields.description: A reference to a controlled vocabulary in which the definition of a value in eco:SurveyTargetValue is given.
fields.rdfs:comment: A related resource from which the described resource is derived.

fields.name: surveyTargetUnit
fields.title: Survey Target Unit
fields.description: Unit associated with a value in eco:surveyTargetValue.
fields.comments: Recommended best practice is to use a controlled vocabulary.
fields.rdfs:comment: Unit associated with a value in eco:surveyTargetValue.

fields.name: surveyTargetUnitIRI
fields.title: Survey Target Unit IRI
fields.description: Unit associated with a value in eco:surveyTargetValue.
fields.comments: Recommended best practice is to use an IRI for a term in a controlled vocabulary.
fields.rdfs:comment: Unit associated with a value in eco:surveyTargetValue.

fields.name: surveyTargetUnitSource
fields.title: Survey Target Unit Source
fields.description: A reference to a controlled vocabulary in which the definition of a value in eco:SurveyTargetUnit is given.
fields.rdfs:comment: A related resource from which the described resource is derived.

fields.name: includeOrExclude
fields.title: Include Or Exclude
fields.description: Whether to include or exclude eco:surveyTargetValue in a scope categorized by eco:surveyTargetType.
fields.comments: Combinations of eco:SurveyTarget records of inclusions and exclusions can define complex scopes such as all flying adult Aves except Passeriformes. Recommended best practice is to use a controlled vocabulary consisting of 'include' and 'exclude' only.
fields.rdfs:comment: Whether to include or exclude eco:surveyTargetValue in a scope categorized by eco:surveyTargetType.
